value:
I understand how stressful it must be to lose your dad's phone, especially when you're trying to track it down quickly. However, I think there may be some confusion—we're a customer support team for [company name], and we don't have access to Uber driver information or the ability to help locate lost items from ride-share services.

For the best chance of recovering your dad's phone, I'd recommend contacting Uber directly through their app or website—they have a dedicated lost and found system and can reach out to the driver on your behalf. You can also try calling the phone to see if the driver answers, or contact local Indianapolis police if you believe the phone won't be returned.

I hope you're able to locate it!
